goal: Release-grade perfection for Backend-definitivo-V5 — measurable, ratcheting, no masked failures.

phases.name: surface_coverage
deliverables: HTTP matrix over all documented paths
engine unit tests for weakest modules

phases.name: contract_hardening
deliverables: Expand STRICT_INVALID_JSON_4xx to all semantically-required-body routes
STRICT_SUCCESS set for endpoints with curated overrides
Reject partial/error on valid matrix payloads where engine has data

phases.name: golden_scientific
deliverables: Golden JSON fixtures from athlete PDFs / lab protocols
Regression tests: same inputs → same outputs (versioned)
FIT assets: minimal, full, corrupt, timezone edge cases

phases.name: coverage_depth
phases.notes: Line within 0.15pp of target; branch gap (~1pp) folded into Phase 5 stretch. Misplaced engine test file removed; depth suite batches 11–15 added.
deliverables: Branch coverage on all api/services and engines/* public APIs
Property/fuzz tests on parsers (FIT, GPX, lab text)

phases.name: perfection_gate
phases.notes: Interim ratcheted to 87/77 (push II). Final gate 92/85 still open; matrix/lockdown/OpenAPI already green.
deliverables: make perfection-gate (or check) is the single release blocker
Documented exceptions list (must be empty or explicitly approved)

non_goals: 100% line coverage on dev-only scripts (audit.py, __main__ blocks)
ratchet_policy: tests/coverage_baseline.json and this manifest advance only when a phase target is met and make check is green.
